recipes.name: Git for Windows
recipes.descriptionEn: Distributed version control. Implicit prerequisite for many AI coding tools.

recipes.name: GitHub CLI
recipes.descriptionEn: The `gh` command-line tool for GitHub: PRs, issues, repos, releases.

recipes.name: VS Code
recipes.descriptionEn: Visual Studio Code — Microsoft's free source editor with rich extension ecosystem.

recipes.name: Cursor
recipes.descriptionEn: AI-first code editor built on VS Code.

recipes.name: Notepad++
recipes.descriptionEn: Lightweight Windows text editor with syntax highlighting.

recipes.name: nvm-windows
recipes.descriptionEn: Node Version Manager for Windows. Lets you switch between multiple Node versions.

recipes.name: Node (recommended)
recipes.descriptionEn: Installs nvm-windows so Windows users can choose and switch Node versions. Recommended for most users; power users can install Node directly themselves.

recipes.name: uv
recipes.descriptionEn: Fast Python package and project manager from Astral. Can install Python itself on demand.

recipes.name: Python (recommended)
recipes.descriptionEn: Installs uv so Windows users can manage Python projects and install Python versions on demand. Recommended for most users; power users can install Python directly themselves.

recipes.name: Windows Subsystem for Linux
recipes.descriptionEn: Enables WSL on this Windows install. Requires a reboot before dependent tools (Docker) can run.

recipes.name: Docker Desktop
recipes.descriptionEn: Docker Desktop for Windows. Uses the WSL2 backend.

recipes.name: NSSM
recipes.descriptionEn: The Non-Sucking Service Manager — wrap any program as a Windows service.

recipes.name: Claude Code CLI
recipes.descriptionEn: Anthropic's official CLI coding agent. Requires Node.

recipes.name: Codex CLI
recipes.descriptionEn: OpenAI's official CLI coding agent. Requires Node.

recipes.name: Gemini CLI
recipes.descriptionEn: Google's official Gemini CLI. Requires Node.

recipes.name: Ollama
recipes.descriptionEn: Run local large language models on your machine.

recipes.name: n8n
recipes.descriptionEn: Workflow automation tool — self-hosted Zapier alternative. Installed as a global npm package.

recipes.name: Bruno
recipes.descriptionEn: Open-source API client. Postman alternative with git-friendly request files.

recipes.name: ripgrep
recipes.descriptionEn: Recursive line-oriented search tool. AI coding agents lean on this heavily.

recipes.name: jq
recipes.descriptionEn: Command-line JSON processor.

recipes.name: fzf
recipes.descriptionEn: General-purpose fuzzy finder for the command line.

recipes.name: OpenClaw
recipes.descriptionEn: Open-source reimplementation of the 1997 game Captain Claw.
